title: Regulatory Filing Calendar — FY2026
summary: Annual regulatory compliance calendar for Northwind Digital Solutions tracking all required federal, provincial, and industry filings with deadlines and consequences.
q1_filing_1_consequence: Penalty of 5% of unpaid tax plus 1% per month up to 12 months
q1_filing_2_consequence: Interest accrues at prescribed CRA rate plus penalties
q2_filing_1_consequence: Late remittance penalty of 3% on first day, increasing by 1% per additional 7 days
q2_filing_2_consequence: Non-compliance with PIPEDA — potential investigation by Privacy Commissioner
q3_filing_1_consequence: Loss of SOC 2 certification — impacts enterprise client contracts
q4_filing_1_consequence: Penalty of $25/day for each day late, up to 100 days
q4_filing_2_consequence: Lapse in coverage — exposure to uninsured liability
annual_1_consequence: Financial penalty under Accessibility for Ontarians with Disabilities Act
